note: Contract-keyed deep capture (059-AT-SPEC). One-time build-time fetch; CI never refetches (offline determinism) — ongoing freshness is the watcher's job via the surface registry. Tier-2 conventions per 052-AT-SPEC: replace-in-place, lineage recorded (snapshot-updated in specs/lineage/log.jsonl), the extractor reads and never writes here. Like plugin-manifest (058-AT-SPEC) and unlike mcp-config: agent-definition has NO machine-readable upstream schema and NO upstream spec versioning — the code.claude.com sub-agents reference page is the spec (prose + the Supported-frontmatter-fields table + YAML examples) and sample agents/*.md files from anthropics/claude-plugins-official are real-world corroboration (authority precedence per 050-AT-SPEC: the reference page is the spec; samples corroborate). ADDITIONAL DEVIATION from plugin-manifest: the frontmatter field table carries Field|Required|Description columns only — no Type column and no Example column — so per-field types are NOT documented tabularly; value-shape facts come from the page's YAML examples instead. spec_version is therefore the capture date, not an upstream-declared revision. RE-VENDORED 2026-07-23 from the captured tier-2 snapshot specs/_vendor/sub-agents/snapshot.md (capture record archive/raw/sub-agents/20260704T094700Z.meta.json). Unlike the hook-config and plugin-manifest re-vendors, this one carries a REAL contract change and was gated on understanding it rather than on --check-fresh being clean: upstream added a 7th permissionMode value `manual` (an alias for `default`, Claude Code v2.1.200+) phrased with an MDX min-version comment and the words 'as an alias for', which turned a closed-set value clause into an open one. The closed-set-only extractor correctly declined to emit an enum; before the open-candidate change that landed alongside this re-vendor, the projection would simply have STOPPED recording any permission-mode values, rendering a value ADDITION as a bare absence. permissionMode remains a documented field the kernel does not model (EXPECTED_DIVERGENCES doc-fields-not-in-kernel), so there is no kernel enum to fold `manual` into and no authoring/v1 edit is implied. Samples are deliberately NOT re-vendored.

files.version_basis: The page carries no version identifier and upstream publishes no machine-readable schema for agents/*.md frontmatter; this .md form is the same URL/form the registry's fetch_sub_agents extractor monitors (capture.urls + ext .md in specs/upstream-surface-registry.v1.json).

Supporting authority only (the kernel upstream-base/agent-definition.v1.json $comment cites it alongside the sub-agents page). It is authoring guidance — it defines NO agent-frontmatter fields, so the extractor does not consume it; vendored for provenance completeness of the contract's cited authority set.

files.selection_basis: Minimal shape: name + description + model only — no tools (exercises the inherits-all-if-omitted default) and no color.
tools as the documented comma-separated plain-scalar string form (Read, Glob, Grep, Bash); no model (exercises the inherit default) and no color.
Fullest common shape: name + description + 10-tool comma-separated string + model: sonnet + color: green (an in-enum color).
tools as a YAML flow array (["Read", "Grep"]) — the second wire form observed in official samples alongside the documented comma-separated string — plus model: inherit.
Block-scalar (|) multi-line description + tools as a YAML flow array + color: magenta — a color value OUTSIDE the page's documented 8-value enum, the capture's key real-world tolerance finding.

samples_note: github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official is listed under unmonitored_candidates in specs/upstream-surface-registry.v1.json (not a registered surface); these vendor-meta entries are the samples' provenance records until a sampleable surface is registered per 050-AT-SPEC change discipline — the same arrangement the plugin-manifest capture (058-AT-SPEC) uses for its sample manifests. All 5 samples were commit-pinned to the repo HEAD at fetch time (the same commit the plugin-manifest samples pin). Ground-truth observations across the 5: only documented fields are used (name, description, tools, model, color); tools appears in BOTH wire forms (the documented comma-separated string AND a YAML flow array); one official sample (agent-creator) uses color: magenta, outside the documented enum.
